title: Ice Skate Boats
description: If a boat is on ice, it turns into a giant Ice skate. (requires EMF or Optifine)
body:
Have you ever driven your boat on ice and thought "this makes no damn sense"? Well, this pack will make even less sense. Ice Skate Boats turns your boats on ice into an Ice skate. Inspired by Super Mario 3D World.

Requires Optifine or [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features).


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/k94qnaXQapk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
